name: Kindle for Mac
description: Amazon Kindle e-book reader for macOS

changelog.note: No dedicated release notes page exists

release_date.note: Native Mac app frozen since March 2023. Catalyst version via App Store API releaseDate.

notes: No Sparkle. No public version API. Native Mac app (v1.40) appears frozen since Mar 2023. Amazon shifted to Catalyst Mac App Store version (v7.61, ID 302584613). Two distinct apps: native (com.amazon.Kindle) and Catalyst (com.amazon.Lassen). Must use browser User-Agent to avoid 503 from Amazon.
